entries.title_en: Neuro-Wideband WiFi Sensing via Self-Conditioned CSI Extrapolation
entries.title_zh: 基于自条件 CSI 外推的神经宽带 Wi-Fi 感知
entries.summary_short_en: Ji, Hou and Wu (January 2026) propose **WUKONG**, a self-supervised framework that synthesises wideband CSI from narrowband measurements — letting commodity Wi-Fi devices "fake" the bandwidth needed for higher-resolution sensing without specialised hardware. The architecture combines a Transformer (for capturing the multipath structure of a sample) with a Diffusion model (for generating the extended-bandwidth CSI conditional on that multipath structure). The output is **eCSI** (extended CSI), which downstream sensing models then consume as if it came from a wider channel.
entries.summary_short_zh: Ji、Hou 和 Wu（2026 年 1 月）提出 **WUKONG（悟空）**，一个自监督框架，能从窄带 CSI 测量合成宽带 CSI —— 让商用 Wi-Fi 设备在不依赖专用硬件的前提下"伪造"出更高分辨率感知所需的带宽。架构组合了 Transformer（用于刻画样本本身的多径结构）与 Diffusion 模型（在该多径结构条件下生成扩展带宽 CSI）。输出 **eCSI**（extended CSI），下游感知模型可以像消费来自更宽信道的 CSI 那样消费它。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

Ji, Hou and Wu (January 2026) propose WUKONG, a self-supervised framework that synthesises wideband CSI from narrowband measurements — letting commodity Wi-Fi devices "fake" the bandwidth needed for higher-resolution sensing without specialised hardware. The architecture combines a Transformer (for capturing the multipath structure of a sample) with a Diffusion model (for generating the extended-bandwidth CSI conditional on that multipath structure). The output is eCSI (extended CSI), which downstream sensing models then consume as if it came from a wider channel.

The key technical move is self-conditioning. Instead of using a fixed prior, the diffusion stage is conditioned on sample-specific multipath parameters extracted by the Transformer. This means the synthesis is per-environment rather than per-dataset — the model adapts to the physical layout it's currently observing.

Validation tasks: localisation and multi-person breathing monitoring. Both benefit from the synthesised wideband data without any extra channel measurements or hardware modifications.

Key technical points

  • Self-supervised training — works on existing CSI without manual labels
  • Architecture: Transformer (multipath extraction) + Diffusion (conditional CSI synthesis)
  • eCSI output — downstream sensing models consume it as if from a wider channel
  • Validated on localisation and multi-person breathing monitoring
  • Hardware-agnostic — runs on commodity Wi-Fi

Why it matters / what's new

  • First "synthesise the missing bandwidth" approach to Wi-Fi sensing. Earlier work either accepted narrow-band limits or required specialised hardware (USRP). WUKONG argues these are no longer the only options.
  • Diffusion is now usable in the Wi-Fi PHY pipeline. The conditioning trick makes diffusion practical despite the per-sample latency hit — significant signal for the next 12 months of CSI-research.
  • Pairs with IBIS (2026-05-01_arxiv-ibis-csi-bandwidth-constrained.md): IBIS makes 20 MHz CSI go further; WUKONG makes 20 MHz CSI look like 80 MHz. Two complementary attacks on the same constraint.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

Ji、Hou 和 Wu（2026 年 1 月）提出 WUKONG（悟空），一个自监督框架，能从窄带 CSI 测量合成宽带 CSI —— 让商用 Wi-Fi 设备在不依赖专用硬件的前提下"伪造"出更高分辨率感知所需的带宽。架构组合了 Transformer（用于刻画样本本身的多径结构）与 Diffusion 模型（在该多径结构条件下生成扩展带宽 CSI）。输出 eCSI（extended CSI），下游感知模型可以像消费来自更宽信道的 CSI 那样消费它。

关键技术动作是自条件（self-conditioning）。Diffusion 阶段不是依赖固定先验，而是依赖 Transformer 抽取的样本特定多径参数。结果是合成是逐环境的，而非逐数据集 —— 模型适应它当下所观测的物理布局。

验证任务：定位与多人呼吸监测。两类任务都能从合成的宽带数据中获益，且无需额外信道测量或硬件改动。

技术要点

  • 自监督训练 —— 在已有 CSI 上即可训练，无需人工标注
  • 架构： Transformer（多径抽取）+ Diffusion（条件 CSI 合成）
  • 输出 eCSI —— 下游感知模型可像消费来自更宽信道的 CSI 那样消费
  • 在定位与多人呼吸监测上验证
  • 与硬件无关 —— 可在商用 Wi-Fi 上运行

意义与新意

  • 首个"合成缺失带宽"思路用于 Wi-Fi 感知。 此前工作要么接受窄带局限，要么依赖专用硬件（USRP）。WUKONG 论证这并非唯一两条路。
  • Diffusion 已经可以进入 Wi-Fi PHY 流水线。 条件化技巧让 Diffusion 在每样本时延代价下变得可用 —— 对未来 12 个月 CSI 研究的方向具有指标意义。
  • 与 IBIS（2026-05-01_arxiv-ibis-csi-bandwidth-constrained.md）形成搭配： IBIS 让 20 MHz CSI 走得更远；WUKONG 让 20 MHz CSI 看起来像 80 MHz。同一约束下的两条互补攻法。
entries.search_blob: neuro-wideband wifi sensing via self-conditioned csi extrapolation 基于自条件 csi 外推的神经宽带 wi-fi 感知 802.11bf wifi-sensing phy-layer generative-ai ji, hou and wu (january 2026) propose **wukong**, a self-supervised framework that synthesises wideband csi from narrowband measurements — letting commodity wi-fi devices "fake" the bandwidth needed for higher-resolution sensing without specialised hardware. the architecture combines a transformer (for capturing the multipath structure of a sample) with a diffusion model (for generating the extended-bandwidth csi conditional on that multipath structure). the output is **ecsi** (extended csi), which downstream sensing models then consume as if it came from a wider channel. ji、hou 和 wu（2026 年 1 月）提出 **wukong（悟空）**，一个自监督框架，能从窄带 csi 测量合成宽带 csi —— 让商用 wi-fi 设备在不依赖专用硬件的前提下"伪造"出更高分辨率感知所需的带宽。架构组合了 transformer（用于刻画样本本身的多径结构）与 diffusion 模型（在该多径结构条件下生成扩展带宽 csi）。输出 **ecsi**（extended csi），下游感知模型可以像消费来自更宽信道的 csi 那样消费它。 academic-paper wifi

entries.title_en: Keysight and Samsung Validate 3GPP Release 19 NR-NTN Direct-to-Device over n252 S-Band
entries.title_zh: Keysight 与三星在 n252 S 频段验证 3GPP Release 19 NR-NTN 直连终端
entries.summary_short_en: On 8 January 2026 Keysight Technologies and Samsung Electronics announced a live demonstration of standardized 3GPP Release 19 New Radio Non-Terrestrial Network (NR-NTN) direct-to-device connectivity over the n252 S-Band. The point of the milestone is that it validates *standardized* satellite-to-device protocols — the Rel-19 NR-NTN specification — rather than the proprietary per-operator architectures that dominated early direct-to-cell deployments, moving the ecosystem toward multi-vendor interoperability.
entries.summary_short_zh: 2026 年 1 月 8 日，Keysight Technologies 与三星电子宣布在 n252 S 频段上完成标准化 3GPP Release 19 New Radio 非地面网络（NR-NTN）直连终端连接的实景演示。该里程碑的意义在于：它验证的是*标准化*的卫星直连终端协议——Rel-19 NR-NTN 规范——而非主导早期直连蜂窝部署的各运营商私有架构，从而推动生态走向多厂商互操作。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

On 8 January 2026 Keysight Technologies and Samsung Electronics announced a live demonstration of standardized 3GPP Release 19 New Radio Non-Terrestrial Network (NR-NTN) direct-to-device connectivity over the n252 S-Band. The point of the milestone is that it validates standardized satellite-to-device protocols — the Rel-19 NR-NTN specification — rather than the proprietary per-operator architectures that dominated early direct-to-cell deployments, moving the ecosystem toward multi-vendor interoperability.

Keysight supplied the end-to-end emulation environment needed to reproduce orbital dynamics — Doppler shift and long, time-varying propagation delays — against which Samsung's NTN-capable modem validated the physical and protocol layers of the Rel-19 spec. The demonstration exercised satellite-to-satellite mobility with advanced handover so that a moving LEO constellation can hand a session between orbital nodes without dropping it, and confirmed direct-to-device operation where a standard unmodified smartphone connects without specialized hardware. The companies reported no quantified throughput/latency figures, framing it as a feasibility-and-protocol-maturity milestone.

Both sides plan deeper interoperability testing through 2026, targeting reference designs for manufacturers integrating satellite connectivity into consumer and industrial IoT devices. For the KB this is the test-and-validation counterpart to the Rel-19 standards-freeze narrative, and a concrete sign that S-band NR-NTN is approaching commercial readiness.

Key technical points

  • First live validation of standardized 3GPP Rel-19 NR-NTN direct-to-device over n252 S-Band (Keysight + Samsung, 8 Jan 2026).
  • Keysight emulated orbital dynamics (Doppler, time-varying propagation delay); Samsung's NTN modem validated PHY + protocol layers.
  • Demonstrated satellite-to-satellite mobility with advanced handover and standard-smartphone direct-to-device operation.
  • Emphasis on standardized (not proprietary) protocols → multi-vendor interoperability path.
  • No public throughput/latency numbers; framed as feasibility/maturity; deeper interop testing planned through 2026.

Why it matters / what's new

Where 2026-05-30_arxiv-5g-nr-ntn-survey-roadmap describes the Rel-19 spec, this shows it running on real test gear over real S-band, with handover and unmodified-handset operation — the practical proof point. The "standardized, not proprietary" framing is the strategic signal: it's the inflection from operator-specific direct-to-cell silos (Starlink, early AST) toward an interoperable 3GPP NTN device ecosystem.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

2026 年 1 月 8 日，Keysight Technologies 与三星电子宣布在 n252 S 频段上完成标准化 3GPP Release 19 New Radio 非地面网络（NR-NTN）直连终端连接的实景演示。该里程碑的意义在于：它验证的是标准化的卫星直连终端协议——Rel-19 NR-NTN 规范——而非主导早期直连蜂窝部署的各运营商私有架构，从而推动生态走向多厂商互操作。

Keysight 提供了再现轨道动力学所需的端到端仿真环境——多普勒频移与长且时变的传播时延——三星的 NTN 调制解调器在此环境下验证了 Rel-19 规范的物理层与协议层。演示验证了带高级切换的星间移动性，使运动中的 LEO 星座能在轨道节点之间无缝交接会话；并确认了直连终端运行——标准未改装手机无需专用硬件即可接入。双方未给出量化的吞吐/时延数据，将其定位为可行性与协议成熟度里程碑。

双方计划在 2026 年开展更深入的互操作测试，目标是为将卫星连接集成进消费及工业 IoT 设备的厂商提供参考设计。对本知识库而言，这是 Rel-19 标准冻结叙事在测试与验证侧的对应，也是 S 频段 NR-NTN 接近商用就绪的具体信号。

技术要点

  • 首个在 n252 S 频段上对标准化 3GPP Rel-19 NR-NTN 直连终端的实景验证（Keysight + 三星，2026-01-08）。
  • Keysight 仿真轨道动力学（多普勒、时变传播时延）；三星 NTN 调制解调器验证物理层 + 协议层。
  • 演示带高级切换的星间移动性，以及标准手机直连终端运行。
  • 强调标准化（非私有）协议 → 多厂商互操作路径。
  • 未公开吞吐/时延数据；定位为可行性/成熟度；计划 2026 年深入互操作测试。

意义与新意

2026-05-30_arxiv-5g-nr-ntn-survey-roadmap 描述 Rel-19 规范，本条目则展示其在真实测试设备、真实 S 频段上运行，含切换与未改装手机操作——实证落点。"标准化而非私有"的定位是战略信号：标志着从运营商专属的直连蜂窝孤岛（星链、早期 AST）转向可互操作的 3GPP NTN 终端生态的拐点。

entries.title_en: 5G NR Non-Terrestrial Networks: From Early Results to the Road Ahead
entries.title_zh: 5G NR 非地面网络（NTN）：从早期结果到未来路线
entries.summary_short_en: Figaro, Rossato, Giordani, Traspadini, Zorzi (University of Padova) and co-authors from Toyota/industry present a survey and forward roadmap of 3GPP 5G NR Non-Terrestrial Networks (NTN), tracing the standard from Release 18 through Release 20. Rather than a pure literature review, the paper anchors its analysis in ns-3 simulations validated against 3GPP calibration data, so the architectural claims come with quantitative backing across satellite configurations.
entries.summary_short_zh: Figaro、Rossato、Giordani、Traspadini、Zorzi（帕多瓦大学）与来自丰田/业界的合作者，对 3GPP 5G NR 非地面网络（NTN）做了综述与前瞻路线梳理，追踪该标准从 Release 18 到 Release 20 的演进。本文并非纯文献综述，而是以经 3GPP 校准数据验证的 ns-3 仿真为支撑，使其架构论断在不同卫星配置下都有定量依据。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

Figaro, Rossato, Giordani, Traspadini, Zorzi (University of Padova) and co-authors from Toyota/industry present a survey and forward roadmap of 3GPP 5G NR Non-Terrestrial Networks (NTN), tracing the standard from Release 18 through Release 20. Rather than a pure literature review, the paper anchors its analysis in ns-3 simulations validated against 3GPP calibration data, so the architectural claims come with quantitative backing across satellite configurations.

The survey walks the NTN evolution: Rel-17 established the baseline NR-NTN and NB-IoT/eMTC-NTN; Rel-18 refined coverage and mobility; Rel-19 (frozen end-2025) adds regenerative payloads (a full gNB on the satellite), store-and-forward operation for delay-tolerant IoT, and RedCap-over-NTN; and Rel-20 points toward deeper terrestrial/non-terrestrial integration and 6G. It synthesizes early real-world deployment findings against the simulated performance and lays out the open challenges — Doppler and propagation-delay handling, inter-satellite handovers, regenerative-payload complexity, and spectrum coexistence.

For the KB this is a strong anchor entry on the standards-and-architecture side of satellite-direct-to-device: it provides the 3GPP frame of reference that the KB's empirical Starlink-measurement and direct-to-device entries plug into, and it makes the case that NTN can supplement terrestrial infrastructure for underserved regions and emergency operations rather than replace it.

Key technical points

  • Survey + roadmap of 3GPP NR-NTN across Rel-18 → Rel-20, backed by ns-3 simulations validated to 3GPP calibration data.
  • Rel-19 (frozen end-2025): regenerative payload (gNB on satellite), store-and-forward delay-tolerant IoT, RedCap-over-NTN.
  • Covers early deployment results, satellite architectures, and integration of emerging tech.
  • Open challenges: Doppler / propagation delay, inter-satellite handover, regenerative-payload complexity, spectrum coexistence.
  • Positioning: NTN as a supplement to terrestrial coverage for remote/emergency use, not a replacement.

Why it matters / what's new

The KB's satellite entries skew empirical (Starlink crowdsourced measurements, queuing characterization, SafeSABR) and commercial (AST, Amazon Leo); this supplies the 3GPP standards spine they hang on, current through the Rel-19 freeze. The ns-3-validated-to-3GPP methodology distinguishes it from marketing-grade NTN overviews. It is the natural companion to 2026-02-23 (elevation-aware SUL for D2D) on the standards side.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

Figaro、Rossato、Giordani、Traspadini、Zorzi（帕多瓦大学）与来自丰田/业界的合作者，对 3GPP 5G NR 非地面网络（NTN）做了综述与前瞻路线梳理，追踪该标准从 Release 18 到 Release 20 的演进。本文并非纯文献综述，而是以经 3GPP 校准数据验证的 ns-3 仿真为支撑，使其架构论断在不同卫星配置下都有定量依据。

综述梳理了 NTN 的演进：Rel-17 确立 NR-NTN 与 NB-IoT/eMTC-NTN 基线；Rel-18 改进覆盖与移动性；Rel-19（2025 年底冻结）引入再生载荷（卫星上运行完整 gNB）、面向时延容忍 IoT 的存储转发（store-and-forward）以及 RedCap-over-NTN；Rel-20 则指向更深的地面/非地面融合与 6G。文章将早期真实部署结果与仿真性能相互印证，并列出开放挑战——多普勒与传播时延处理、星间切换、再生载荷复杂度、频谱共存。

对本知识库而言，这是卫星直连终端在标准与架构侧的有力锚点条目：它提供了 KB 中星链实测与直连终端经验性条目所依托的 3GPP 参照框架，并论证 NTN 可作为地面基础设施的补充（服务欠覆盖地区与应急），而非取代。

技术要点

  • 对 3GPP NR-NTN 从 Rel-18 到 Rel-20 的综述 + 路线，以经 3GPP 校准验证的 ns-3 仿真为支撑。
  • Rel-19（2025 年底冻结）：再生载荷（卫星上 gNB）、存储转发时延容忍 IoT、RedCap-over-NTN。
  • 涵盖早期部署结果、卫星架构与新兴技术融合。
  • 开放挑战：多普勒/传播时延、星间切换、再生载荷复杂度、频谱共存。
  • 定位：NTN 作为地面覆盖在偏远/应急场景的补充，而非替代。

意义与新意

KB 的卫星条目偏经验（星链众包实测、排队特性、SafeSABR）与商业（AST、Amazon Leo）；本文补上它们所依附的 3GPP 标准主干，且更新至 Rel-19 冻结。其"ns-3 仿真对齐 3GPP 校准"的方法使其区别于营销级 NTN 概述。它是 2026-02-23（面向 D2D 的仰角感知补充上行）在标准侧的天然搭档。
entries.search_blob: 5g nr non-terrestrial networks: from early results to the road ahead 5g nr 非地面网络（ntn）：从早期结果到未来路线 ntn 5g-nr 3gpp rel-19 rel-20 leo direct-to-device ns-3 figaro, rossato, giordani, traspadini, zorzi (university of padova) and co-authors from toyota/industry present a survey and forward roadmap of 3gpp 5g nr non-terrestrial networks (ntn), tracing the standard from release 18 through release 20. rather than a pure literature review, the paper anchors its analysis in ns-3 simulations validated against 3gpp calibration data, so the architectural claims come with quantitative backing across satellite configurations. figaro、rossato、giordani、traspadini、zorzi（帕多瓦大学）与来自丰田/业界的合作者，对 3gpp 5g nr 非地面网络（ntn）做了综述与前瞻路线梳理，追踪该标准从 release 18 到 release 20 的演进。本文并非纯文献综述，而是以经 3gpp 校准数据验证的 ns-3 仿真为支撑，使其架构论断在不同卫星配置下都有定量依据。 academic-paper satellite

entries.title_en: Wi-Fi Alliance launches Wi-Fi CERTIFIED 7 for 20 MHz-only client devices (CES 2026)
entries.title_zh: Wi-Fi 联盟为仅 20 MHz 客户端设备推出 Wi-Fi CERTIFIED 7（CES 2026）
entries.summary_short_en: Wi-Fi Alliance announced at CES 2026 (January 2026) a new Wi-Fi CERTIFIED 7 certification track specifically for **client devices that operate only on 20 MHz channels**. The certification carves a low-complexity, low-power IoT-friendly path into the otherwise wideband-centric Wi-Fi 7 ecosystem. It targets battery-powered sensors, smart-home devices, wearables, and other low-data-rate endpoints that don't need the 320 MHz / multi-band capability the rest of the standard is built around but still want the modern feature set (improved scheduling, MLO awareness, security).
entries.summary_short_zh: Wi-Fi 联盟在 2026 年 1 月的 CES 2026 上发布了一项新的 Wi-Fi CERTIFIED 7 认证子类，**专为仅在 20 MHz 信道工作的客户端设备**而设。该认证在以宽带为中心的 Wi-Fi 7 生态中开辟出一条低复杂度、低功耗、对 IoT 友好的路径，目标对象是电池供电传感器、智能家居设备、可穿戴设备以及其他低数据率终端 —— 它们用不上标准本身围绕的 320 MHz / 多频段能力，但仍希望享受现代特性（更好的调度、MLO 意识、安全性）。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

Wi-Fi Alliance announced at CES 2026 (January 2026) a new Wi-Fi CERTIFIED 7 certification track specifically for client devices that operate only on 20 MHz channels. The certification carves a low-complexity, low-power IoT-friendly path into the otherwise wideband-centric Wi-Fi 7 ecosystem. It targets battery-powered sensors, smart-home devices, wearables, and other low-data-rate endpoints that don't need the 320 MHz / multi-band capability the rest of the standard is built around but still want the modern feature set (improved scheduling, MLO awareness, security).

The 20-MHz-only profile gives such devices three concrete advantages: lower power consumption (narrower channels need less RF and DSP), simpler RF design (cheaper, more compact silicon), and better link reliability in dense deployments where a 20 MHz client is less exposed to wideband interference. The certification preserves Wi-Fi 7's core multi-user benefits — multiple devices can transmit upstream simultaneously without waiting in line — which is the part of the standard that actually matters in dense IoT scenarios.

The announcement formally creates a "low-end Wi-Fi 7" product category. Vendors that have been hesitant to put full-bandwidth Wi-Fi 7 chipsets into low-cost IoT silicon now have a defined certification target that fits the cost / power envelope.

Key technical points

  • Certification: Wi-Fi CERTIFIED 7 — 20 MHz-only client device profile
  • Announced: CES 2026, January 2026
  • Device targets: low-data-rate IoT, sensors, wearables, smart-home, battery-powered devices
  • Benefits: lower power, simpler RF, lower silicon cost, improved interference robustness in dense scenarios
  • Preserves Wi-Fi 7 multi-user benefits (concurrent uplink without contention waiting)
  • Implicit Wi-Fi 7 feature set still applies (where 20-MHz capable): MLO-awareness, modern security, etc.

Why it matters / what's new

  • Splits the Wi-Fi 7 product line. Until now Wi-Fi 7 was implicitly "wideband + multi-band". The 20-MHz cert formalises a low-end branch and lowers the activation energy for IoT silicon vendors to pick up Wi-Fi 7 features.
  • Locks in the IoT segment for Wi-Fi 7 ahead of Wi-Fi 8. Without this certification, low-end IoT was likely to either skip Wi-Fi 7 or wait for a future low-power Wi-Fi 8 profile. The certification creates a real upgrade path now.
  • Scout signal: the next 12-18 months should show low-cost Wi-Fi 7 IoT chips from MediaTek, Espressif, and similar IoT-leaning vendors. Track those when they appear.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

Wi-Fi 联盟在 2026 年 1 月的 CES 2026 上发布了一项新的 Wi-Fi CERTIFIED 7 认证子类，专为仅在 20 MHz 信道工作的客户端设备而设。该认证在以宽带为中心的 Wi-Fi 7 生态中开辟出一条低复杂度、低功耗、对 IoT 友好的路径，目标对象是电池供电传感器、智能家居设备、可穿戴设备以及其他低数据率终端 —— 它们用不上标准本身围绕的 320 MHz / 多频段能力，但仍希望享受现代特性（更好的调度、MLO 意识、安全性）。

仅 20 MHz 的子类为这类设备带来三项具体优势：更低的功耗（窄带所需 RF 与 DSP 更少）、更简洁的RF 设计（芯片更便宜、更紧凑）、以及在密集部署下更好的链路可靠性（20 MHz 客户端对宽带干扰暴露更小）。该认证仍保留 Wi-Fi 7 的核心多用户优势 —— 多设备可以同时上行而不必排队 —— 这正是密集 IoT 场景中真正关键的能力。

本次发布正式确立了"低端 Wi-Fi 7"产品类别。此前对在低成本 IoT 硅片中加入完整带宽 Wi-Fi 7 芯片心存犹豫的厂商，现在有了一个匹配成本 / 功耗包络的认证目标。

技术要点

  • 认证： Wi-Fi CERTIFIED 7 —— 仅 20 MHz 客户端子类
  • 发布： CES 2026，2026 年 1 月
  • 目标设备：低数据率 IoT、传感器、可穿戴、智能家居、电池设备
  • 优势：低功耗、简化 RF、低硅成本、密集场景下更好的抗干扰
  • 保留 Wi-Fi 7 多用户优势（无需排队竞争即可同时上行）
  • 在 20 MHz 范围内仍享有 Wi-Fi 7 的现代特性（MLO 意识、新安全机制等）

意义与新意

  • 将 Wi-Fi 7 产品线进行分层。 此前 Wi-Fi 7 隐含定位为"宽带 + 多频段"。20 MHz 认证正式确立了低端分支，并降低 IoT 硅片厂商采用 Wi-Fi 7 特性的启动门槛。
  • 在 Wi-Fi 8 到来之前为 IoT 板块锁定 Wi-Fi 7。 没有该认证，低端 IoT 很可能会跳过 Wi-Fi 7 或等到未来的低功耗 Wi-Fi 8 子类。该认证现在就提供了真实的升级路径。
  • 巡检线索： 未来 12-18 个月应该会看到联发科、Espressif 等 IoT 倾向厂商推出低成本 Wi-Fi 7 IoT 芯片。出现时建议重点跟踪。
entries.search_blob: wi-fi alliance launches wi-fi certified 7 for 20 mhz-only client devices (ces 2026) wi-fi 联盟为仅 20 mhz 客户端设备推出 wi-fi certified 7（ces 2026） 802.11be iot products wi-fi alliance announced at ces 2026 (january 2026) a new wi-fi certified 7 certification track specifically for **client devices that operate only on 20 mhz channels**. the certification carves a low-complexity, low-power iot-friendly path into the otherwise wideband-centric wi-fi 7 ecosystem. it targets battery-powered sensors, smart-home devices, wearables, and other low-data-rate endpoints that don't need the 320 mhz / multi-band capability the rest of the standard is built around but still want the modern feature set (improved scheduling, mlo awareness, security). wi-fi 联盟在 2026 年 1 月的 ces 2026 上发布了一项新的 wi-fi certified 7 认证子类，**专为仅在 20 mhz 信道工作的客户端设备**而设。该认证在以宽带为中心的 wi-fi 7 生态中开辟出一条低复杂度、低功耗、对 iot 友好的路径，目标对象是电池供电传感器、智能家居设备、可穿戴设备以及其他低数据率终端 —— 它们用不上标准本身围绕的 320 mhz / 多频段能力，但仍希望享受现代特性（更好的调度、mlo 意识、安全性）。 industry-news wifi

entries.title_en: Nordic nRF54LM20B: Bluetooth LE SoC with 128 MHz Axon NPU for On-Device Edge AI
entries.title_zh: Nordic nRF54LM20B：集成 128 MHz Axon NPU 的蓝牙 LE SoC，面向端侧边缘 AI
entries.summary_short_en: Nordic Semiconductor's nRF54LM20B is a Bluetooth LE system-on-chip that integrates a dedicated 128 MHz Axon Neural Processing Unit (NPU) for on-device edge-AI workloads such as sound classification and keyword spotting. Nordic claims the NPU delivers up to 7× faster performance and up to 8× higher energy efficiency versus competing wireless solutions, and runs inference roughly 15× faster than the on-chip Cortex-M33 alone — keeping always-on classification within a coin-cell power budget without a cloud round-trip.
entries.summary_short_zh: Nordic Semiconductor 的 nRF54LM20B 是一款蓝牙 LE 片上系统，集成了专用的 128 MHz Axon 神经处理单元（NPU），用于声音分类、关键词唤醒等端侧边缘 AI 任务。Nordic 称该 NPU 相比竞品无线方案性能最高快 7 倍、能效最高高 8 倍，推理速度约为仅用片上 Cortex-M33 的 15 倍——在纽扣电池功耗预算内实现常开分类，无需云端往返。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

Nordic Semiconductor's nRF54LM20B is a Bluetooth LE system-on-chip that integrates a dedicated 128 MHz Axon Neural Processing Unit (NPU) for on-device edge-AI workloads such as sound classification and keyword spotting. Nordic claims the NPU delivers up to 7× faster performance and up to 8× higher energy efficiency versus competing wireless solutions, and runs inference roughly 15× faster than the on-chip Cortex-M33 alone — keeping always-on classification within a coin-cell power budget without a cloud round-trip.

Beyond the NPU, the SoC pairs a 128 MHz Arm Cortex-M33 with a 128 MHz RISC-V (FLPR) coprocessor, 2 MB NVM, and 512 KB RAM. Its ultra-low-power 2.4 GHz radio supports Bluetooth LE, Bluetooth Channel Sounding (the Bluetooth 6.x secure fine-ranging feature), Matter-over-Thread, Zigbee, and proprietary modes up to 4 Mbps, with −96 dBm BLE (1 Mbps) and −101 dBm 802.15.4 RX sensitivity. I/O is generous: up to 66 GPIOs (CSP98), high-speed USB, high-speed SPI/UART, an 8-channel 14-bit/2 MS/s ADC, PDM/TDM/PWM/QDEC, and NFC. Packages are a 6×6 mm QFN52 (35 GPIO) or 3.9×3.7 mm CSP98 (66 GPIO).

Nordic ships the part through the nRF Connect SDK plus ultra-compact Neuton edge-AI models (typically under 5 KB) and a "Nordic Edge AI Lab" tool for generating custom anomaly-detection, gesture/activity-recognition, and biometric models without cloud connectivity. The nRF54LM20B was sampling to selected customers at announcement (Jan 2026) with general availability scheduled for Q2 2026.

Key technical points

  • Dedicated 128 MHz Axon NPU: up to 7× faster / 8× more energy-efficient vs competing wireless solutions; ~15× faster than the Cortex-M33 for inference.
  • 128 MHz Cortex-M33 + 128 MHz RISC-V FLPR coprocessor; 2 MB NVM; 512 KB RAM.
  • 2.4 GHz radio: Bluetooth LE + Channel Sounding, Matter/Thread, Zigbee, proprietary up to 4 Mbps; RX −96 dBm BLE / −101 dBm 802.15.4.
  • Up to 66 GPIO, high-speed USB, 8ch 14-bit 2 MS/s ADC, NFC; QFN52 or CSP98 packages.
  • Neuton models <5 KB + Nordic Edge AI Lab for cloud-free model generation; sampling Jan 2026, GA Q2 2026.

Why it matters / what's new

This is the clearest 2026 signal that BLE silicon is absorbing dedicated NPU blocks — pushing always-on inference (keyword spotting, anomaly detection) onto the connectivity SoC itself rather than a separate AI chip. For the KB it anchors the bt-le bin in the edge-AI direction and ties to Channel Sounding (the part supports it natively), bridging the location and AI threads. It is the Bluetooth-side counterpart to the broader "AI on the radio SoC" trend the WiFi entries track.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

Nordic Semiconductor 的 nRF54LM20B 是一款蓝牙 LE 片上系统，集成了专用的 128 MHz Axon 神经处理单元（NPU），用于声音分类、关键词唤醒等端侧边缘 AI 任务。Nordic 称该 NPU 相比竞品无线方案性能最高快 7 倍、能效最高高 8 倍，推理速度约为仅用片上 Cortex-M33 的 15 倍——在纽扣电池功耗预算内实现常开分类，无需云端往返。

除 NPU 外，该 SoC 搭配 128 MHz Arm Cortex-M33 与 128 MHz RISC-V（FLPR）协处理器、2 MB NVM 与 512 KB RAM。其超低功耗 2.4 GHz 射频支持蓝牙 LE、蓝牙信道探测（Bluetooth 6.x 的安全精测距特性）、Matter-over-Thread、Zigbee 及最高 4 Mbps 的私有模式，BLE（1 Mbps）接收灵敏度 −96 dBm，802.15.4 为 −101 dBm。I/O 丰富：最多 66 个 GPIO（CSP98）、高速 USB、高速 SPI/UART、8 通道 14 位/2 MS/s ADC、PDM/TDM/PWM/QDEC 以及 NFC。封装为 6×6 mm QFN52（35 GPIO）或 3.9×3.7 mm CSP98（66 GPIO）。

Nordic 通过 nRF Connect SDK 提供该器件，并配套超紧凑的 Neuton 边缘 AI 模型（通常小于 5 KB）以及用于生成自定义异常检测、手势/活动识别与生物特征模型的 "Nordic Edge AI Lab" 工具，全程无需云连接。nRF54LM20B 在发布时（2026 年 1 月）向部分客户送样，量产计划在 2026 年第二季度。

技术要点

  • 专用 128 MHz Axon NPU：相比竞品最高快 7 倍/能效高 8 倍；推理约为 Cortex-M33 的 15 倍。
  • 128 MHz Cortex-M33 + 128 MHz RISC-V FLPR 协处理器；2 MB NVM；512 KB RAM。
  • 2.4 GHz 射频：蓝牙 LE + 信道探测、Matter/Thread、Zigbee、最高 4 Mbps 私有模式；接收 −96 dBm BLE / −101 dBm 802.15.4。
  • 最多 66 GPIO、高速 USB、8 通道 14 位 2 MS/s ADC、NFC；QFN52 或 CSP98 封装。
  • Neuton 模型 <5 KB + Nordic Edge AI Lab 实现无云模型生成；2026 年 1 月送样，Q2 2026 量产。

意义与新意

这是 2026 年最清晰的信号之一：BLE 芯片正在吸纳专用 NPU 模块——把常开推理（关键词唤醒、异常检测）下沉到连接 SoC 本身，而非独立 AI 芯片。对 KB 而言，它把 bt-le 分箱锚定到边缘 AI 方向，并与信道探测（该器件原生支持）相连，打通定位与 AI 两条线索。它是 WiFi 条目所追踪的 "射频 SoC 上的 AI" 大趋势在蓝牙侧的对应。

entries.title_en: MediaTek Filogic 8000 family announced at CES 2026 — first Wi-Fi 8 platform shipping later in 2026
entries.title_zh: 联发科 Filogic 8000 系列在 CES 2026 亮相 —— 首款 Wi-Fi 8 平台将于 2026 年下半年量产
entries.summary_short_en: MediaTek used CES 2026 (January 2026) to debut the Filogic 8000 chipset family, its Wi-Fi 8 / 802.11bn product line. The announcement was timeline-only; deep technical specs and per-SKU performance claims were not detailed. MediaTek positions the family as "later this year" availability — implying second-half 2026 shipping.
entries.summary_short_zh: 联发科在 2026 年 1 月的 CES 2026 上发布了 Filogic 8000 芯片系列，这是其面向 Wi-Fi 8 / 802.11bn 的产品线。本次发布只透露了时间表，并未公开具体技术规格和单 SKU 性能数据。联发科将上市时间定为"本年度晚些时候"，暗示量产将落在 2026 下半年。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

MediaTek used CES 2026 (January 2026) to debut the Filogic 8000 chipset family, its Wi-Fi 8 / 802.11bn product line. The announcement was timeline-only; deep technical specs and per-SKU performance claims were not detailed. MediaTek positions the family as "later this year" availability — implying second-half 2026 shipping.

Coupled with Qualcomm's FastConnect 8800 / Dragonwing NPro A8 Elite at MWC 2026 (see 2026-05-01_qualcomm-wifi8-mwc2026.md), MediaTek's Filogic 8000 establishes that both major mobile-WiFi silicon vendors will have Wi-Fi 8 silicon shipping into the supply chain before the standard is even ratified (May 2028 SA Ballot per 2026-05-01_ieee-tgbn-d2-schedule.md). This is the same pattern as Wi-Fi 7: silicon ships against draft, devices launch against late draft, certification follows ratification by ~12 months.

MediaTek's announcement is corroborating evidence of the timeline; it doesn't itself add new technical surface. The interesting follow-up is the Filogic 8000 spec sheets when they appear — they will reveal which D1.x features MediaTek is implementing (i.e., considers stable enough to bake into silicon) and which are deferred (i.e., still in flux).

Key technical points

  • Family name: MediaTek Filogic 8000
  • Announced: CES 2026 (January 2026)
  • Availability: "Later in 2026" — second half implied
  • Targets: routers, mesh APs, gateways (typical Filogic positioning)
  • Detailed specs not yet public

Why it matters / what's new

Confirms the second major Wi-Fi 8 silicon platform is in the pipeline alongside Qualcomm's. Two-vendor signal is a good proxy for "this generation is real and on schedule." Worth a follow-up scout run when MediaTek publishes the Filogic 8000 datasheets — those will reveal the specific 802.11bn D1.x features MediaTek considers locked.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

联发科在 2026 年 1 月的 CES 2026 上发布了 Filogic 8000 芯片系列，这是其面向 Wi-Fi 8 / 802.11bn 的产品线。本次发布只透露了时间表，并未公开具体技术规格和单 SKU 性能数据。联发科将上市时间定为"本年度晚些时候"，暗示量产将落在 2026 下半年。

结合高通在 MWC 2026 上发布的 FastConnect 8800 / Dragonwing NPro A8 Elite（见 2026-05-01_qualcomm-wifi8-mwc2026.md），可以确认两大主要移动 Wi-Fi 芯片厂商都将在 Wi-Fi 8 标准正式批准（依据 2026-05-01_ieee-tgbn-d2-schedule.md，正式 SA Ballot 时间为 2028 年 5 月）之前推出芯片。这与 Wi-Fi 7 的节奏一致：芯片对照 Draft 量产，设备对照后期 Draft 上市，认证则在标准批准后大约 12 个月跟进。

联发科本次发布从内容上看更多是对时间表的佐证，本身没有新增技术面。真正值得继续追踪的是 Filogic 8000 规格书发布之后 —— 那时可以看出联发科把 D1.x 中的哪些特性"敲死"进了硅，而把哪些留作后续修订。

技术要点

  • 系列名称： 联发科 Filogic 8000
  • 发布时间： CES 2026（2026 年 1 月）
  • 上市时间： "2026 年晚些时候" —— 暗示下半年
  • 目标市场： 路由器、Mesh AP、网关（Filogic 一贯定位）
  • 详细规格尚未公开

意义与新意

确认了继高通之后第二个主要 Wi-Fi 8 硅平台已进入路线图。两家厂商同步推进通常意味着"这一代标准是真的、且按计划推进"。当联发科正式发布 Filogic 8000 规格书时值得重点回访 —— 那时可以读出联发科认为已锁定的 802.11bn D1.x 具体特性。

entries.title_en: TP-Link Aireal at CES 2026: Microsoft Azure / GPT-class LLM cloud assistant unifying Wi-Fi management + Tapo / Deco smart-home control
entries.title_zh: TP-Link Aireal 在 CES 2026：基于微软 Azure / GPT 类 LLM 的云助手，统一 Wi-Fi 管理与 Tapo / Deco 智能家居
entries.summary_short_en: TP-Link unveiled **Aireal™** at CES 2026 (January 6 2026), positioned as an LLM-driven AI assistant that **unifies Wi-Fi management and smart-home control** across the TP-Link Tapo and Deco product lines through a single conversational interface. Aireal is built in collaboration with Microsoft and runs in the cloud — not on the router — using **Azure Machine Learning Online Endpoints** for "scalable, low-latency inference," with the model stack drawn from Microsoft Foundry foundation models (**GPT-4.1, GPT-5, GPT-5-mini, GPT-4o-realtime**) plus TP-Link's own object-detection models for Tapo camera streams and Azure AI Speech for voice interaction.
entries.summary_short_zh: TP-Link 于 2026 年 1 月 6 日 CES 2026 发布 **Aireal™**，将其定位为以 LLM 驱动的 AI 助手，**通过单一对话界面，把 Wi-Fi 管理与智能家居控制统一起来**——覆盖 TP-Link Tapo 与 Deco 全线。Aireal 与微软合作打造，**运行在云端而非路由器上**：推理由 **Azure Machine Learning Online Endpoints** 承担，模型栈来自 Microsoft Foundry 基础模型（**GPT-4.1、GPT-5、GPT-5-mini、GPT-4o-realtime**）+ TP-Link 自研的针对 Tapo 摄像头流的物体检测模型 + Azure AI Speech 语音交互。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

TP-Link unveiled Aireal™ at CES 2026 (January 6 2026), positioned as an LLM-driven AI assistant that unifies Wi-Fi management and smart-home control across the TP-Link Tapo and Deco product lines through a single conversational interface. Aireal is built in collaboration with Microsoft and runs in the cloud — not on the router — using Azure Machine Learning Online Endpoints for "scalable, low-latency inference," with the model stack drawn from Microsoft Foundry foundation models (GPT-4.1, GPT-5, GPT-5-mini, GPT-4o-realtime) plus TP-Link's own object-detection models for Tapo camera streams and Azure AI Speech for voice interaction.

The product surface is conversational: natural-language video event search ("show me all the times someone was at the front door yesterday"), automation routine creation in plain language, AI summarisation of notifications, and "AI QoS and network self-healing" features for Wi-Fi management (the press piece names them but does not detail the underlying mechanism). It is multimodal — voice, text, and video — but the processing is server-side; only the camera feeds and prompts move from the router to the cloud.

Architecturally this is the first major consumer-router vendor productising a cloud-LLM agent on top of its Wi-Fi management plane in a single cohesive UX. The novelty for the KB is not a new MAC mechanism but the explicit cloud-LLM dependency in the consumer Wi-Fi data path — a distinct point in the design space from the on-device-LLM line (arxiv-on-device-llm-roaming, arxiv-mab-llm-mlo-channel-allocation) and from the agentic-research-stack line (arxiv-mapc-llm-agents, arxiv-comagent-multi-llm-wireless, arxiv-wirelessbench-llm-agent). It also sits alongside Cisco's Agentic Mesh / Mist Large Experience Model evolution captured in hpe-aruba-mist-unified-2026 — both confirm "LLM at the edge of the Wi-Fi product" is becoming a default 2026 UX choice, but TP-Link's commitment is uniquely cloud-only and consumer-tier.

Key technical points

  • Form factor: cloud-LLM-driven conversational AI assistant; runs entirely in cloud, not on router; multimodal (voice / text / video).
  • Cloud / model stack: Azure Machine Learning Online Endpoints; Microsoft Foundry foundation models (GPT-4.1, GPT-5, GPT-5-mini, GPT-4o-realtime); TP-Link object-detection models for Tapo camera streams; Azure AI Speech.
  • Product surface: unified Tapo (cameras / smart-home) + Deco (mesh Wi-Fi) experience; conversational video event search; natural-language automation routines; notification summarisation; "AI QoS and network self-healing" (no mechanism details published).
  • Privacy / data movement: camera streams + voice prompts traverse from router/AP to Azure cloud — explicit cloud dependency.
  • Where it sits in the design space: distinct from the on-device-LLM research line; distinct from the multi-agent / multi-LLM research line (e.g. ComAgent); aligns with the agentic-AI-on-the-AP movement (Cisco Agentic Mesh / Mist Large Experience Model) but tilts to consumer + pure-cloud.

Why it matters / what's new

The KB has both an academic line on LLM-for-wireless (arxiv-mapc-llm-agents, arxiv-on-device-llm-roaming, arxiv-llm-rl-wireless-optimization, arxiv-comagent-multi-llm-wireless, arxiv-wirelessagent-plus-plus, arxiv-wirelessbench-llm-agent, arxiv-mab-llm-mlo-channel-allocation, arxiv-llm-6ghz-wifi-nru-coexistence) and an enterprise-product line (hpe-aruba-mist-unified-2026 — Mist Large Experience Model + Aruba Agentic Mesh). TP-Link Aireal is the first consumer-tier entry: GPT-class LLMs in the production Wi-Fi UX of one of the largest consumer router vendors. The cloud-only architecture is a deliberate choice (cost, latency, and update cadence all favour cloud over on-device for the consumer SKU) — and it surfaces a distinct strategic risk surface from the academic on-device line: every Aireal interaction is a cloud round-trip, with the consequent privacy / availability implications (camera frames in cloud, network self-healing dependent on cloud reachability). The product also confirms the broader 2026 narrative that the competitive UX on consumer Wi-Fi has shifted from "fastest router" to "best AI assistant" — a positioning shift that none of the standards-side entries (ieee-january-2026-readout, ieee-march-2026-readout) capture but which materially shapes what consumers will buy.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

TP-Link 于 2026 年 1 月 6 日 CES 2026 发布 Aireal™，将其定位为以 LLM 驱动的 AI 助手，通过单一对话界面，把 Wi-Fi 管理与智能家居控制统一起来——覆盖 TP-Link Tapo 与 Deco 全线。Aireal 与微软合作打造，运行在云端而非路由器上：推理由 Azure Machine Learning Online Endpoints 承担，模型栈来自 Microsoft Foundry 基础模型（GPT-4.1、GPT-5、GPT-5-mini、GPT-4o-realtime）+ TP-Link 自研的针对 Tapo 摄像头流的物体检测模型 + Azure AI Speech 语音交互。

产品形态以对话为中心：自然语言搜索视频事件（"显示昨天所有有人在前门的时刻"）、用自然语言创建自动化规则、AI 通知摘要，以及 Wi-Fi 管理侧的"AI QoS 与网络自愈"特性（官方宣布但未公开底层机制）。它是多模态的——语音、文本、视频——但 处理过程 全部在服务器侧；只有摄像头流与提示词从路由器走向云端。

架构上，这是 首个主流消费级路由器厂商在其 Wi-Fi 管理面之上、以单一连贯 UX 产品化云 LLM 智能体的案例。对 KB 而言的新意不在 MAC 层机制——而在于消费侧 Wi-Fi 数据路径上明确的云 LLM 依赖，这与"LLM 在端上"研究脉络（arxiv-on-device-llm-roaming、arxiv-mab-llm-mlo-channel-allocation）与"研究侧智能体栈"脉络（arxiv-mapc-llm-agents、arxiv-comagent-multi-llm-wireless、arxiv-wirelessbench-llm-agent）都是不同的设计点。它与 hpe-aruba-mist-unified-2026 中 Cisco Agentic Mesh / Mist Large Experience Model 的演进并列——共同确认"LLM 进 Wi-Fi 产品边缘"已成为 2026 年默认 UX 路径；但 TP-Link 的承诺独有 纯云端 + 消费级 这一组合。

技术要点

  • 形态： 云 LLM 驱动的对话式 AI 助手；完全运行在云端，不在路由器；多模态（语音 / 文本 / 视频）。
  • 云 / 模型栈： Azure Machine Learning Online Endpoints；Microsoft Foundry 基础模型（GPT-4.1、GPT-5、GPT-5-mini、GPT-4o-realtime）；TP-Link 自研的 Tapo 摄像头物体检测模型；Azure AI Speech。
  • 产品面： Tapo（摄像 / 智能家居）+ Deco（Mesh Wi-Fi）统一体验；对话式视频事件搜索；自然语言自动化规则；通知摘要；"AI QoS 与网络自愈"（机制未公开）。
  • 隐私 / 数据流向： 摄像头视频流 + 语音 prompts 由路由器 / AP 传到 Azure 云——明确的云依赖。
  • 设计空间定位： 与"端侧 LLM"研究脉络不同；与多智能体 / 多 LLM 研究脉络（如 ComAgent）不同；与"智能体进 AP"潮流（Cisco Agentic Mesh / Mist Large Experience Model）方向一致，但更偏消费级且纯云。

意义与新意

KB 已经有学术侧的"LLM × 无线"脉络（arxiv-mapc-llm-agents、arxiv-on-device-llm-roaming、arxiv-llm-rl-wireless-optimization、arxiv-comagent-multi-llm-wireless、arxiv-wirelessagent-plus-plus、arxiv-wirelessbench-llm-agent、arxiv-mab-llm-mlo-channel-allocation、arxiv-llm-6ghz-wifi-nru-coexistence），也有企业产品侧的脉络（hpe-aruba-mist-unified-2026——Mist Large Experience Model + Aruba Agentic Mesh）。TP-Link Aireal 是首个 消费级 入口：GPT 类 LLM 已进入头部消费路由器厂商的生产 Wi-Fi UX。"纯云"架构是有意的选择（消费级 SKU 在成本、时延、更新节奏上都偏向云，而非端侧）——也带来与"端侧 LLM"研究脉络不同的战略风险面：每次 Aireal 交互都是一次云往返，由此而来的隐私 / 可用性影响（摄像帧上云、网络自愈依赖云可达）值得跟踪。这一产品也印证 2026 年更大叙事：消费级 Wi-Fi 的 竞争 UX 已从"最快路由器"转向"最佳 AI 助手"——这个定位变化，标准侧条目（ieee-january-2026-readout、ieee-march-2026-readout）都不会捕捉，但实际上塑造着消费者最终买什么。
entries.search_blob: tp-link aireal at ces 2026: microsoft azure / gpt-class llm cloud assistant unifying wi-fi management + tapo / deco smart-home control tp-link aireal 在 ces 2026：基于微软 azure / gpt 类 llm 的云助手，统一 wi-fi 管理与 tapo / deco 智能家居 products agentic-ai tp-link unveiled **aireal™** at ces 2026 (january 6 2026), positioned as an llm-driven ai assistant that **unifies wi-fi management and smart-home control** across the tp-link tapo and deco product lines through a single conversational interface. aireal is built in collaboration with microsoft and runs in the cloud — not on the router — using **azure machine learning online endpoints** for "scalable, low-latency inference," with the model stack drawn from microsoft foundry foundation models (**gpt-4.1, gpt-5, gpt-5-mini, gpt-4o-realtime**) plus tp-link's own object-detection models for tapo camera streams and azure ai speech for voice interaction. tp-link 于 2026 年 1 月 6 日 ces 2026 发布 **aireal™**，将其定位为以 llm 驱动的 ai 助手，**通过单一对话界面，把 wi-fi 管理与智能家居控制统一起来**——覆盖 tp-link tapo 与 deco 全线。aireal 与微软合作打造，**运行在云端而非路由器上**：推理由 **azure machine learning online endpoints** 承担，模型栈来自 microsoft foundry 基础模型（**gpt-4.1、gpt-5、gpt-5-mini、gpt-4o-realtime**）+ tp-link 自研的针对 tapo 摄像头流的物体检测模型 + azure ai speech 语音交互。 product wifi

entries.title_en: Broadcom unveils unified Wi-Fi 8 platform at CES 2026 — BCM4918 APU + BCM6714 / BCM6719 dual-band radios
entries.title_zh: 博通在 CES 2026 发布统一 Wi-Fi 8 平台 —— BCM4918 APU + BCM6714 / BCM6719 双频射频
entries.summary_short_en: At CES 2026 (January 2026), Broadcom announced its first-wave Wi-Fi 8 / 802.11bn product family with three new parts that, together, span the complete AP / gateway stack. The headline part is the **BCM4918 APU** (accelerated processing unit), an SoC that combines high-performance CPUs, networking offload, and a dedicated **Broadcom Neural Engine** for on-device AI inference. Broadcom positions the chip as the substrate for "real-time agentic applications" running directly on the home router. Two companion dual-band Wi-Fi 8 radios round out the portfolio: **BCM6714** and **BCM6719**, both targeting integrated 2.4 / 5 / 6 GHz operation with energy-efficiency and real-time-analytics enhancements.
entries.summary_short_zh: 博通在 2026 年 1 月的 CES 2026 上发布了首批 Wi-Fi 8 / 802.11bn 产品家族，包括三款新芯片，共同覆盖整个 AP / 网关栈。旗舰是 **BCM4918 APU**（加速处理单元），这是一颗集成高性能 CPU、网络卸载和专用 **Broadcom Neural Engine**（神经引擎）的 SoC，可在终端进行 AI 推理。博通将其定位为家用路由器上"实时智能体应用"的运行底座。两款配套的双频 Wi-Fi 8 射频 **BCM6714** 与 **BCM6719** 完整了产品线，都面向 2.4 / 5 / 6 GHz 一体化工作并加入了能效与实时分析增强。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

At CES 2026 (January 2026), Broadcom announced its first-wave Wi-Fi 8 / 802.11bn product family with three new parts that, together, span the complete AP / gateway stack. The headline part is the BCM4918 APU (accelerated processing unit), an SoC that combines high-performance CPUs, networking offload, and a dedicated Broadcom Neural Engine for on-device AI inference. Broadcom positions the chip as the substrate for "real-time agentic applications" running directly on the home router. Two companion dual-band Wi-Fi 8 radios round out the portfolio: BCM6714 and BCM6719, both targeting integrated 2.4 / 5 / 6 GHz operation with energy-efficiency and real-time-analytics enhancements.

The announcement is a meaningful counterweight to Qualcomm's MWC 2026 portfolio: where Qualcomm's Dragonwing NPro A8 Elite lands at the high-performance enterprise-AP segment, Broadcom's BCM4918 + BCM6714 / 6719 combination targets residential and mesh deployments. Broadcom emphasises that the unified platform lets operators deliver "new real-time agentic applications for residential consumers" with built-in security and improved power efficiency — explicit operator-marketing alignment with the AI-native messaging the rest of the industry has converged on.

Coupled with MediaTek's Filogic 8000 (CES 2026, see 2026-05-01_mediatek-filogic8000-ces2026.md) and Qualcomm's Dragonwing portfolio (MWC 2026, see 2026-05-01_qualcomm-wifi8-mwc2026.md), Broadcom's announcement makes it three out of three major Wi-Fi silicon vendors with first-generation Wi-Fi 8 silicon publicly committed before the IEEE 802.11bn standard is even ratified (May 2028 target — see 2026-05-01_ieee-tgbn-d2-schedule.md).

Key technical points

  • BCM4918 APU: combined CPU + networking offload + Broadcom Neural Engine NPU, positioned for on-device agentic AI workloads
  • BCM6714 / BCM6719: dual-band Wi-Fi 8 radios with integrated 2.4 / 5 / 6 GHz support
  • Marketing line: "real-time agentic applications" for residential / consumer endpoints
  • Energy-efficiency and real-time analytics enhancements highlighted
  • Broadcom is the third major Wi-Fi silicon vendor to ship Wi-Fi 8 first-gen silicon, after MediaTek (CES 2026) and Qualcomm (MWC 2026)
  • Standardization completion target: May 2028 (TGbn) — silicon precedes ratification by ~2 years, consistent with the Wi-Fi 7 cycle

Why it matters / what's new

  • Three-vendor confirmation: with Broadcom now in, the entire major-vendor Wi-Fi 8 silicon trifecta is publicly committed. This is the strongest market signal yet that the 802.11bn timeline is on track and that "AP as edge AI compute node" is the consensus product framing for this generation.
  • NPU-on-AP is now table-stakes: BCM4918's Neural Engine, Qualcomm's Hexagon NPU, and MediaTek's likely AI block (specs pending) all encode the same architectural assumption. Future scout work should specifically track which MAC-level flows each NPU is being used to accelerate.
  • Residential vs enterprise split is becoming visible: Broadcom's home-router focus vs Qualcomm's enterprise-AP focus suggests the Wi-Fi 8 silicon market is segmenting along familiar lines rather than fighting in the middle.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

博通在 2026 年 1 月的 CES 2026 上发布了首批 Wi-Fi 8 / 802.11bn 产品家族，包括三款新芯片，共同覆盖整个 AP / 网关栈。旗舰是 BCM4918 APU（加速处理单元），这是一颗集成高性能 CPU、网络卸载和专用 Broadcom Neural Engine（神经引擎）的 SoC，可在终端进行 AI 推理。博通将其定位为家用路由器上"实时智能体应用"的运行底座。两款配套的双频 Wi-Fi 8 射频 BCM6714 与 BCM6719 完整了产品线，都面向 2.4 / 5 / 6 GHz 一体化工作并加入了能效与实时分析增强。

该发布是对高通 MWC 2026 产品组合的有力对应：高通的 Dragonwing NPro A8 Elite 主打高性能企业 AP，而博通的 BCM4918 + BCM6714 / 6719 组合主打家庭和 Mesh 部署。博通强调其统一平台允许运营商在家庭场景下提供"实时智能体应用"，并保留内建安全与更佳能效 —— 这是与全行业 AI 原生主线高度一致的运营商导向叙事。

结合联发科 Filogic 8000（CES 2026，见 2026-05-01_mediatek-filogic8000-ces2026.md）和高通 Dragonwing 系列（MWC 2026，见 2026-05-01_qualcomm-wifi8-mwc2026.md），博通本次发布意味着三大主要 Wi-Fi 芯片厂商都已经在 IEEE 802.11bn 标准正式批准（2028 年 5 月，详见 2026-05-01_ieee-tgbn-d2-schedule.md）之前公开承诺第一代 Wi-Fi 8 硅片。

技术要点

  • BCM4918 APU： CPU + 网络卸载 + Broadcom Neural Engine NPU 三合一，定位于端侧智能体 AI 工作负载
  • BCM6714 / BCM6719： 双频 Wi-Fi 8 射频，集成 2.4 / 5 / 6 GHz
  • 宣传主线："为家庭 / 消费侧带来实时智能体应用"
  • 强调能效与实时分析增强
  • 博通是三大 Wi-Fi 芯片厂商中第三家发布 Wi-Fi 8 首代硅片的厂商，前两家分别是联发科（CES 2026）和高通（MWC 2026）
  • 标准化完成节点：2028 年 5 月（TGbn）—— 硅片领先标准批准约两年，与 Wi-Fi 7 节奏一致

意义与新意

  • 三家厂商落定： 加入博通后，三大主要厂商的 Wi-Fi 8 硅片已全部公开承诺。这是 802.11bn 时间表如期、并且"AP 作为边缘 AI 计算节点"成为本代产品共识框架的最强市场信号。
  • NPU-on-AP 已成必备： BCM4918 的 Neural Engine、高通的 Hexagon NPU 以及联发科预期的 AI 模块（待披露）都暗含同一架构前提。后续巡检应重点跟踪每家 NPU 主要加速的 MAC 流类型。
  • 家用 vs 企业市场已形成分化： 博通主打家用路由、高通主打企业 AP，意味着 Wi-Fi 8 硅片市场正按既有路线分层，而非在中段贴身肉搏。

entries.title_en: Calterah Dubhe UWB SoC: a 2T4R IEEE 802.15.4ab chip integrating ranging and radar, verified on Rohde & Schwarz CMP200
entries.title_zh: 加特兰 Dubhe UWB SoC：集测距与雷达于一体的 2T4R IEEE 802.15.4ab 芯片，经罗德与施瓦茨 CMP200 验证
entries.summary_short_en: Calterah announced the Dubhe UWB SoC at CES 2026, positioning it as "the world's first UWB chip to fully comply with the new IEEE 802.15.4ab standard." Its distinguishing feature is a 2T4R (two-transmit, four-receive) front end that integrates both precise ranging/positioning and radar sensing on a single die, so a car can use one chip for digital-key distance measurement and for in-cabin/around-vehicle radar functions (child-presence detection, intrusion detection, kick-to-open tailgate) without separate components. The part is built on a 22-nm process.
entries.summary_short_zh: 加特兰（Calterah）在 CES 2026 上发布 Dubhe UWB SoC，称其为"全球首颗完全符合新版 IEEE 802.15.4ab 标准的 UWB 芯片"。其最大特点是 2T4R（两发四收）前端，将高精度测距/定位与雷达感知集成于单颗芯片，使汽车可用一颗芯片同时完成数字钥匙测距与车内/车周雷达功能（儿童遗留检测、入侵检测、踢脚感应尾门），无需分立器件。该芯片采用 22 纳米工艺。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

Calterah announced the Dubhe UWB SoC at CES 2026, positioning it as "the world's first UWB chip to fully comply with the new IEEE 802.15.4ab standard." Its distinguishing feature is a 2T4R (two-transmit, four-receive) front end that integrates both precise ranging/positioning and radar sensing on a single die, so a car can use one chip for digital-key distance measurement and for in-cabin/around-vehicle radar functions (child-presence detection, intrusion detection, kick-to-open tailgate) without separate components. The part is built on a 22-nm process.

For ranging, Dubhe uses BLE-Assisted-MMS (Bluetooth-Low-Energy-assisted multi-millisecond) operation — BLE bootstraps and assists the UWB multi-millisecond ranging session — and claims reliable measurement beyond 400 m, including positioning through five vehicles in an underground garage. Calterah cites 32% lower transmit power and 56% lower receive power versus comparable solutions. IEEE 802.15.4ab PHY functionality was verified using Rohde & Schwarz's CMP200 radio communication tester, a FiRa-Consortium-certified platform, with Calterah and R&S jointly demonstrating the ecosystem at CES 2026 (announced January 5, 2026).

Key technical points

  • First fully 802.15.4ab-compliant SoC claim: PHY verified on Rohde & Schwarz CMP200 (FiRa-certified tester).
  • 2T4R, ranging + radar on one die: single chip serves digital-key positioning and radar sensing (CPD, intrusion, kick-to-open).
  • BLE-Assisted-MMS ranging: BLE assists the UWB multi-millisecond ranging session; >400 m reliable range, through-five-vehicles underground.
  • 22-nm process; 32% lower TX power, 56% lower RX power vs comparable solutions.
  • Target: automotive digital car key + in/around-vehicle sensing. Announced CES 2026 (Jan 5, 2026).

Why it matters / what's new

This adds a third independent 802.15.4ab silicon data point to the KB alongside STMicroelectronics' ST64UWB (2026-05-25_stmicroelectronics-st64uwb-802154ab) and CEVA's Ceva-Waves UWB IP (2026-05-26_ceva-waves-uwb-ip-802154ab), confirming the pre-ratification 4ab silicon race is now multi-vendor. Dubhe's distinctive angle is the 2T4R single-die integration of ranging and radar (most early 4ab parts lead with ranging) and the explicit BLE-Assisted-MMS long-range mode (>400 m, through-five-vehicles), which together push 802.15.4ab toward the automotive sensing+access convergence rather than ranging alone. The Rohde & Schwarz CMP200 verification is also a useful concrete signal that FiRa-certified 4ab PHY test equipment is in the field.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

加特兰（Calterah）在 CES 2026 上发布 Dubhe UWB SoC，称其为"全球首颗完全符合新版 IEEE 802.15.4ab 标准的 UWB 芯片"。其最大特点是 2T4R（两发四收）前端，将高精度测距/定位与雷达感知集成于单颗芯片，使汽车可用一颗芯片同时完成数字钥匙测距与车内/车周雷达功能（儿童遗留检测、入侵检测、踢脚感应尾门），无需分立器件。该芯片采用 22 纳米工艺。

测距方面，Dubhe 采用 BLE-Assisted-MMS（蓝牙低功耗辅助的多毫秒测距）方式——由 BLE 引导并辅助 UWB 的多毫秒测距会话——宣称可在超过 400 米范围内可靠测量，并能在地下车库中穿透五辆车实现定位。加特兰称其发射功耗较同类方案降低 32%、接收功耗降低 56%。其 IEEE 802.15.4ab 物理层功能经罗德与施瓦茨 CMP200 无线通信测试仪（FiRa 联盟认证平台）验证，加特兰与 R&S 在 CES 2026 联合演示整套生态（发布于 2026 年 1 月 5 日）。

技术要点

  • 宣称首颗完全符合 802.15.4ab 的 SoC：物理层经罗德与施瓦茨 CMP200（FiRa 认证测试仪）验证。
  • 2T4R，单芯片集测距+雷达：一颗芯片兼顾数字钥匙定位与雷达感知（儿童遗留、入侵、踢脚开门）。
  • BLE-Assisted-MMS 测距：BLE 辅助 UWB 多毫秒测距会话；>400 米可靠测距，地下穿透五辆车。
  • 22 纳米工艺；发射功耗降 32%、接收功耗降 56%（对比同类方案）。
  • 目标：汽车数字钥匙 + 车内/车周感知。发布于 CES 2026（2026-01-05）。

意义与新意

本条目为 KB 增添了第三个独立的 802.15.4ab 硅片数据点，与意法半导体 ST64UWB（2026-05-25_stmicroelectronics-st64uwb-802154ab）和 CEVA 的 Ceva-Waves UWB IP（2026-05-26_ceva-waves-uwb-ip-802154ab）并列，印证标准定案前的 4ab 硅片竞赛已是多厂商格局。Dubhe 的独特之处在于 2T4R 单芯片集成测距与雷达（多数早期 4ab 芯片以测距为主），以及明确的 BLE-Assisted-MMS 远距模式（>400 米、穿透五辆车）——二者共同把 802.15.4ab 推向"汽车感知+门禁"融合，而非仅测距。罗德与施瓦茨 CMP200 验证也是一个具体信号：FiRa 认证的 4ab 物理层测试设备已就位。

entries.title_en: FedWiLoc: Federated Learning for Privacy-Preserving WiFi Indoor Localization
entries.title_zh: FedWiLoc：保护隐私的 Wi-Fi 室内定位联邦学习方案
entries.summary_short_en: FedWiLoc (December 2025, submitted to MobiSys '26) makes the case that production indoor-localization deployments don't need to centralise raw RSS / CSI data to train a usable model. The system trains a localization model under federated learning across multiple physical environments — each device contributes gradient updates only, never the underlying observations — and reports **median localization error of 55 cm** with **90th-percentile error of 155 cm** across a multi-site evaluation.
entries.summary_short_zh: FedWiLoc（2025 年 12 月，投稿 MobiSys '26）论证：生产级室内定位部署并不需要把原始 RSS / CSI 数据集中到一处才能训练可用模型。该系统在多个物理环境间用联邦学习训练定位模型 —— 每台设备只贡献梯度更新，不上传原始观测 —— 在多场景评测中报告**中位定位误差 55 cm，第 90 百分位误差 155 cm**。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

FedWiLoc (December 2025, submitted to MobiSys '26) makes the case that production indoor-localization deployments don't need to centralise raw RSS / CSI data to train a usable model. The system trains a localization model under federated learning across multiple physical environments — each device contributes gradient updates only, never the underlying observations — and reports median localization error of 55 cm with 90th-percentile error of 155 cm across a multi-site evaluation.

The technical contribution is the federation strategy. Indoor localization models are notoriously environment-specific (a model trained in lab A doesn't work in office B). FedWiLoc handles this with a federation scheme that preserves cross-environment transferability without leaking which environment any individual gradient came from.

Key technical points

  • Federated training across multiple physical environments
  • Median error 55 cm; 90th-percentile error 155 cm
  • Privacy-preserving: only gradients leave the device
  • MobiSys '26 submission

Why it matters / what's new

  • Privacy-positioning intersection is concrete now. Combined with the FTM-security paper (2026-05-01_arxiv-secure-wifi-ranging-az-bk.md), the 2026 indoor-positioning research agenda has security & privacy as first-class concerns.
  • Federated localisation that actually transfers. Most prior FL-localisation work fails when deployed across heterogeneous environments. The 55 cm number across multi-site evaluation is the first credible cross-site federated result.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

FedWiLoc（2025 年 12 月，投稿 MobiSys '26）论证：生产级室内定位部署并不需要把原始 RSS / CSI 数据集中到一处才能训练可用模型。该系统在多个物理环境间用联邦学习训练定位模型 —— 每台设备只贡献梯度更新，不上传原始观测 —— 在多场景评测中报告中位定位误差 55 cm，第 90 百分位误差 155 cm。

技术贡献在于联邦策略。室内定位模型出了名的"环境强相关"（实验室 A 训练的模型在办公室 B 用不了）。FedWiLoc 用一种保持跨环境迁移性的联邦方案应对，同时不会泄露每条梯度来自哪个具体环境。

技术要点

  • 跨多个物理环境的联邦训练
  • 中位误差 55 cm；第 90 百分位 155 cm
  • 隐私保护：设备只外传梯度
  • 投稿 MobiSys '26

意义与新意

  • 隐私 + 定位交叉点已经具体化。 加上 FTM 安全论文（2026-05-01_arxiv-secure-wifi-ranging-az-bk.md），2026 年室内定位研究议程已经把安全与隐私列为一等议题。
  • 真正具备迁移性的联邦定位。 此前大多数联邦定位工作在跨异构环境时失败。多场景评测下 55 cm 中位误差是首批可信的跨场景联邦结果。
entries.search_blob: fedwiloc: federated learning for privacy-preserving wifi indoor localization fedwiloc：保护隐私的 wi-fi 室内定位联邦学习方案 wifi-sensing security agentic-ai fedwiloc (december 2025, submitted to mobisys '26) makes the case that production indoor-localization deployments don't need to centralise raw rss / csi data to train a usable model. the system trains a localization model under federated learning across multiple physical environments — each device contributes gradient updates only, never the underlying observations — and reports **median localization error of 55 cm** with **90th-percentile error of 155 cm** across a multi-site evaluation. fedwiloc（2025 年 12 月，投稿 mobisys '26）论证：生产级室内定位部署并不需要把原始 rss / csi 数据集中到一处才能训练可用模型。该系统在多个物理环境间用联邦学习训练定位模型 —— 每台设备只贡献梯度更新，不上传原始观测 —— 在多场景评测中报告**中位定位误差 55 cm，第 90 百分位误差 155 cm**。 academic-paper wifi

entries.title_en: China publishes GB/T 46803.1-2025 and GB/T 46803.2-2025: SparkLink SLE elevated from industry-alliance specs to national standards
entries.title_zh: 中国发布 GB/T 46803.1-2025、GB/T 46803.2-2025：星闪 SLE 从行业团体标准升格为国家标准
entries.summary_short_en: On 12 December 2025, China officially approved and released two new GB/T national standards for SparkLink (Huawei/Alliance branding: 星闪 / NearLink) short-distance wireless communication: **GB/T 46803.1-2025** and **GB/T 46803.2-2025**. Both standards cover the SLE (SparkLink Low Energy / 单链路扩展) profile — the low-power, low-cost branch of SparkLink that sits alongside the higher-throughput SLB (SparkLink Basic) profile. The release moves SparkLink SLE from the alliance / industry-spec layer (the existing `T/XS` series, e.g. `T/XS 10002` for SLE access-layer requirements) up to the formal national-standard layer, where compliance has regulatory weight in the Chinese market.
entries.summary_short_zh: 2025 年 12 月 12 日，中国正式批准发布两项 SparkLink（华为/联盟品牌：星闪 / NearLink）短距无线通信新国家标准：**GB/T 46803.1-2025** 与 **GB/T 46803.2-2025**。两项标准均针对 SLE（SparkLink Low Energy / 单链路扩展，俗称低功耗模式）档位——SparkLink 中与高吞吐 SLB（SparkLink Basic）并存的低功耗、低成本分支。本次发布把 SparkLink SLE 从联盟/团体标准层（已有的 `T/XS` 系列，例如规定 SLE 接入层要求的 `T/XS 10002`）升至正式国家标准层，使合规在中国市场具备监管效力。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

On 12 December 2025, China officially approved and released two new GB/T national standards for SparkLink (Huawei/Alliance branding: 星闪 / NearLink) short-distance wireless communication: GB/T 46803.1-2025 and GB/T 46803.2-2025. Both standards cover the SLE (SparkLink Low Energy / 单链路扩展) profile — the low-power, low-cost branch of SparkLink that sits alongside the higher-throughput SLB (SparkLink Basic) profile. The release moves SparkLink SLE from the alliance / industry-spec layer (the existing T/XS series, e.g. T/XS 10002 for SLE access-layer requirements) up to the formal national-standard layer, where compliance has regulatory weight in the Chinese market.

The two-part split is the conventional GB/T pattern for layered comms standards — typically Part 1 carries the architecture / general requirements and Part 2 specifies a particular layer (access / PHY / MAC) — but the per-Part technical scope was not surfaced in the public summaries available at backfill time; the standards' detailed text is gated behind the SAMR standards portal. What the public announcement does confirm is the milestone: GB/T 46803 is the first national-standard elevation of SparkLink content, intended to lead industry-standard development and provide "key technical support" for normalised, scaled deployment of SparkLink across vertical industries (consumer electronics, automotive digital keys, smart home, audio, robotics).

This sits in the broader SparkLink roadmap that the KB has been tracking: SparkLink 1.0 alliance standard (Nov 2022, dual-mode SLE/SLB), SparkLink 2.0 alliance standards (Mar 2024 series; Mar 2025 refresh adding audio + integrated sensing), the device-side rollouts on Pura 80 / Mate 70 / Watch 5 + the ICCE-SparkLink car-key wave (2026-05-24 entries), and the ecosystem position summarised in 2026-05-21_sparklink-ecosystem-2026-overview (1000–1200 alliance members, Chip-IP labs, OpenLab). GB/T 46803 is the regulatory / national-standard counterpart to that ecosystem buildout.

Key technical points

  • Two new GB/T national standards released 2025-12-12: GB/T 46803.1-2025 and GB/T 46803.2-2025.
  • Both target the SLE (SparkLink Low Energy) profile of SparkLink/NearLink — the low-power branch (paired with the higher-throughput SLB profile).
  • Elevation: from alliance / industry-spec layer (existing T/XS series, e.g. T/XS 10002 for SLE access requirements) to formal national-standard layer (GB/T = recommended national standard).
  • Two-part split follows the conventional GB/T pattern for comms standards (Part 1 = general / architecture, Part 2 = specific layer); per-Part scope not surfaced in public summaries at backfill time — the SAMR portal carries the full text.
  • Intent (per official announcements): lead industry-standard development; enable normalised, scaled cross-industry deployment (consumer, auto digital keys, smart home, audio, robotics).
  • Sits alongside: SparkLink 1.0 (Nov 2022 alliance), SparkLink 2.0 (Mar 2024 / Mar 2025 refresh w/ audio + ISAC), the 2026 device-side rollout (Pura 80 / Mate 70 / Watch 5 / ICCE-SparkLink car key).

Why it matters / what's new

The KB's prior NearLink coverage is alliance specs + product rollouts (the 2022 SLE/SLB 1.0 release, the 2024–2025 SparkLink 2.0 series, the May-2024 car-key wave). GB/T 46803 changes the regulatory layer: SparkLink SLE now has formal Chinese national-standard backing, which strengthens its position against Bluetooth (the comparator the alliance and Chinese press most often cite) in any procurement or vertical that defers to GB/T compliance. Combined with the December 2025 release date, it explains why 2026's NearLink momentum (SparkLink Cup, Chip-IP labs, vehicle integrations) appears to have a settled regulatory backdrop rather than still-evolving alliance-only specs. Entry is source_quality: snippet_only because per-Part scope was not in public summaries — next time the alliance or a vendor publishes a normative compliance note, ingest the deeper detail.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

2025 年 12 月 12 日，中国正式批准发布两项 SparkLink（华为/联盟品牌：星闪 / NearLink）短距无线通信新国家标准：GB/T 46803.1-2025 与 GB/T 46803.2-2025。两项标准均针对 SLE（SparkLink Low Energy / 单链路扩展，俗称低功耗模式）档位——SparkLink 中与高吞吐 SLB（SparkLink Basic）并存的低功耗、低成本分支。本次发布把 SparkLink SLE 从联盟/团体标准层（已有的 T/XS 系列，例如规定 SLE 接入层要求的 T/XS 10002）升至正式国家标准层，使合规在中国市场具备监管效力。

按 GB/T 分层通信标准的惯例，两部分通常是"第 1 部分：架构/总则；第 2 部分：某一具体层（接入 / 物理层 / MAC）"——但在本回填整理时，公开摘要并未披露分部技术细节；标准全文需在国家标准信息公共服务平台（SAMR）查询。公开通告确认的核心要点是里程碑本身：GB/T 46803 是 SparkLink 内容首次以国家标准形式升格，旨在引领行业标准发展，为中国新一代短距无线通信生态在多行业（消费电子、汽车数字钥匙、智能家居、音频、机器人）的规模化与规范化部署提供"关键技术支撑"。

这与本 KB 已跟踪的 SparkLink 路线图相呼应：SparkLink 1.0 联盟标准（2022 年 11 月，SLE/SLB 双模）、SparkLink 2.0 联盟标准系列（2024 年 3 月；2025 年 3 月新增音频与通感一体）、设备端在 Pura 80 / Mate 70 / Watch 5 上的落地以及 ICCE-星闪车钥匙浪潮（2026-05-24 条目），以及 2026-05-21_sparklink-ecosystem-2026-overview 中归纳的生态格局（1000–1200 家联盟成员、芯片 IP 实验室、OpenLab）。GB/T 46803 是这一生态建设在监管/国家标准层面的对应物。

技术要点

  • 2025-12-12 发布两项 GB/T 国家标准：GB/T 46803.1-2025、GB/T 46803.2-2025。
  • 均面向 SparkLink/星闪 的 SLE（低功耗）档位（与高吞吐 SLB 并存）。
  • 升格：由联盟/团体标准层（既有 T/XS 系列，如 SLE 接入要求 T/XS 10002）升至国家标准层（GB/T = 推荐性国家标准）。
  • 两部分采用 GB/T 通信标准惯例（第 1 部分为总则/架构、第 2 部分为某一具体层）；回填时公开摘要未披露分部细节，全文在 SAMR 国家标准平台。
  • 官方意图：引领行业标准发展；推动跨行业（消费电子、汽车数字钥匙、智能家居、音频、机器人）的规模化、规范化部署。
  • 关联条目：SparkLink 1.0（2022-11 联盟）、SparkLink 2.0（2024-03 / 2025-03 含音频+通感）、2026 年设备侧落地（Pura 80 / Mate 70 / Watch 5 / ICCE 星闪车钥匙）。

意义与新意

本 KB 此前的 NearLink 内容集中在联盟标准与产品落地（2022 年 SLE/SLB 1.0 发布、2024–2025 的 SparkLink 2.0 系列、2024 年 5 月起的车钥匙浪潮）。GB/T 46803 改变的是监管层：SparkLink SLE 现已获得中国国家标准的正式背书，这在任何遵循 GB/T 合规的采购或垂直行业中，都会强化其相对蓝牙（联盟与中国媒体最常援引的比较对象）的位置。结合 2025 年 12 月的发布时点，可解释为何 2026 年 NearLink 的势头（星闪杯、芯片 IP 实验室、车型整合）呈现"监管背景已就位"的形态，而非仍在演化的联盟标准。本条目标记为 source_quality: snippet_only，因为分部细节未见公开摘要——下次联盟或厂商发布规范性合规说明时，应回填更深入的细节。

entries.title_en: Wi-Fi: Twenty-Five Years and Counting
entries.title_zh: Wi-Fi 二十五年：演进、现状与展望
entries.summary_short_en: Geraci et al. (Dec 2025 v2) is a comprehensive 25-year retrospective covering IEEE 802.11b through emerging 802.11bn. The author list is a who's-who of the academic Wi-Fi community (UPF, INESC, Nokia Bell, Ikerlan, AMD, Rice, NSF). It is a tutorial / survey, not a primary research paper, but is the single best onboarding document for anyone joining the field from outside.
entries.summary_short_zh: Geraci 等人于 2025 年 12 月发布的 v2 版本是一篇覆盖 IEEE 802.11b 到 emerging 802.11bn 的 25 年综述。作者列表覆盖了 Wi-Fi 学术界的核心人物（UPF、INESC、Nokia Bell、Ikerlan、AMD、Rice、NSF）。这是一篇教程性 / 综述性文章，并非原创研究，但它是任何从外部进入本领域的人最值得读的入门材料。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

Geraci et al. (Dec 2025 v2) is a comprehensive 25-year retrospective covering IEEE 802.11b through emerging 802.11bn. The author list is a who's-who of the academic Wi-Fi community (UPF, INESC, Nokia Bell, Ikerlan, AMD, Rice, NSF). It is a tutorial / survey, not a primary research paper, but is the single best onboarding document for anyone joining the field from outside.

The most current value is in two appendices: the AI/ML appendix (Appendix D) explicitly tracks the IEEE 802.11 AI ML SC's exploratory work — the same activity that, per separate reporting, has now spawned the AI Offload Study Group at the March 2026 plenary. The 802.11bn section confirms: "low-latency and high reliability [are] first-class citizens", with MAPC, ELR PPDU, and unequal-modulation as the headline new features.

The tutorial framing makes it a useful background-citation source and a fast onboarding read for newcomers to 802.11.

Key technical points

  • Coverage: 802.11b → 802.11bn, all generations
  • Sections: spectrum allocation, PHY, MAC, multi-user, energy savings, MLO, MAPC
  • Appendix D: AI/ML in 802.11 — automation, resource allocation, traffic prediction
  • Confirms 802.11bn priorities: low-latency + reliability via MAPC, ELR PPDUs, unequal modulation
  • 11 co-authors spanning academia + industry (UPF, INESC, Nokia Bell, Ikerlan, AMD, Rice, …)

Why it matters / what's new

Reference / onboarding asset, not a research contribution. Useful as:

  • Citation backbone for prior-art surveys
  • Onboarding read for those new to 802.11
  • Cross-reference target when a finding mentions a mechanism not yet captured here

Low novelty — won't itself break new ground, but informs what's already public.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

Geraci 等人于 2025 年 12 月发布的 v2 版本是一篇覆盖 IEEE 802.11b 到 emerging 802.11bn 的 25 年综述。作者列表覆盖了 Wi-Fi 学术界的核心人物（UPF、INESC、Nokia Bell、Ikerlan、AMD、Rice、NSF）。这是一篇教程性 / 综述性文章，并非原创研究，但它是任何从外部进入本领域的人最值得读的入门材料。

当下最具时效性的价值集中在 两个附录：AI/ML 附录（附录 D）梳理了 IEEE 802.11 AI ML SC 的探索性工作 —— 即据另一渠道报道在 2026 年 3 月全会上催生 AI Offload 研究组的那条线。802.11bn 章节确认："低时延和高可靠性是一等公民"，MAPC、ELR PPDU 和不等调制是本代标志性新特性。

整篇文章的教程定位让它适合作为背景引文和 802.11 新手的快速上手读物。

技术要点

  • 覆盖范围：802.11b → 802.11bn 所有代际
  • 章节安排：频谱分配、PHY、MAC、多用户、节能、MLO、MAPC
  • 附录 D：802.11 中的 AI/ML —— 自动化、资源分配、流量预测
  • 确认 802.11bn 优先方向：低时延 + 高可靠性，通过 MAPC、ELR PPDU、不等调制实现
  • 11 位作者横跨学术界与产业界（UPF、INESC、Nokia Bell、Ikerlan、AMD、Rice 等）

意义与新意

参考资料 / 入门材料，而非原创贡献。可用于：

  • 现有技术综述的引文骨干
  • 802.11 新手的入门读物
  • 当其他条目提到本 KB 中尚未收录的某一机制时的交叉引用目标

新颖性较低 —— 它本身不会带来新突破，但能告诉读者哪些内容已属公开。

entries.title_en: HPE merges Aruba Central and Juniper Mist platforms — unified AI-native enterprise WLAN brain (Q1 2026)
entries.title_zh: HPE 整合 Aruba Central 与 Juniper Mist 平台 —— 统一 AI 原生的企业 WLAN 大脑（2026 第一季度）
entries.summary_short_en: Following HPE's acquisition of Juniper Networks (closed late 2025), HPE Discover unveiled the integration plan for the two enterprise WLAN management platforms: **Aruba Central** and **Juniper Mist**. The two platforms are being merged into a single "AI-native network brain" with shared capabilities rolling out throughout Q1 2026. The strategy is described internally as **"build once, deploy twice"** — common functionality is built into a unified codebase, then surfaced through both Aruba and Mist UIs while the products converge.
entries.summary_short_zh: 继 HPE 在 2025 年底完成对 Juniper Networks 的收购后，HPE Discover 大会披露了两大企业 WLAN 管理平台 **Aruba Central** 与 **Juniper Mist** 的整合计划：两个平台将合并为一个"AI 原生的网络大脑"，共享能力将在 2026 第一季度陆续上线。HPE 内部将该策略称为**"一次构建、两次发布"** —— 通用能力沉淀进统一代码库，然后通过 Aruba 与 Mist 各自的 UI 暴露出去，同时产品逐步收敛。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

Following HPE's acquisition of Juniper Networks (closed late 2025), HPE Discover unveiled the integration plan for the two enterprise WLAN management platforms: Aruba Central and Juniper Mist. The two platforms are being merged into a single "AI-native network brain" with shared capabilities rolling out throughout Q1 2026. The strategy is described internally as "build once, deploy twice" — common functionality is built into a unified codebase, then surfaced through both Aruba and Mist UIs while the products converge.

For enterprise Wi-Fi engineers this is the largest WLAN-management consolidation event of the post-Wi-Fi-6 era. Aruba Central and Mist had been the two leading AI-driven WLAN management platforms in their respective camps; HPE now controls both. CEO Antonio Neri's framing — that Wi-Fi 7 deployments will be the first generation managed under the unified platform — anchors the consolidation against the Wi-Fi 7 deployment surge already underway (see 2026-05-01_wifi7-deployment-milestone-2026.md).

The competitive position is also clearer: HPE Aruba and Cisco are now the two-horse race in enterprise WLAN per IDC's market-leader designations, with Cisco answering with its G300 AI networking chip and AgenticOps management suite, plus liquid-cooled Nexus 8000/9000 switches due in H2 2026.

Key technical points

  • Two platforms merged: Aruba Central + Juniper Mist into a unified codebase
  • Strategy: "build once, deploy twice" — shared backend, dual UIs while products converge
  • Timeline: Q1 2026 rollout of shared capabilities
  • Anchored against Wi-Fi 7: Wi-Fi 7 deployments will be the first generation managed unified
  • Competitive landscape: HPE Aruba vs Cisco; Cisco's G300 chip + AgenticOps + liquid-cooled Nexus switches H2 2026
  • Market position (IDC): HPE Aruba and Cisco the only two enterprise-WLAN market leaders

Why it matters / what's new

  • Largest enterprise-WLAN consolidation of the decade. When the buyer of every cycle's leading-vendor announcement is the same vendor, the management-plane diversity story for enterprise WLAN gets a step thinner. Worth tracking what happens to interoperability with non-HPE access points.
  • AI-native management isn't optional any more. Both HPE and Cisco's responses centre on agentic AI in the management plane — implicitly raising the floor for any enterprise WLAN sale.
  • Customer-side decision pressure. Enterprises currently running mixed Aruba/Mist fleets now have a roadmap (and a vendor preference) to consolidate. Procurement decisions through 2026 will be made with this convergence in mind.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

继 HPE 在 2025 年底完成对 Juniper Networks 的收购后，HPE Discover 大会披露了两大企业 WLAN 管理平台 Aruba Central 与 Juniper Mist 的整合计划：两个平台将合并为一个"AI 原生的网络大脑"，共享能力将在 2026 第一季度陆续上线。HPE 内部将该策略称为"一次构建、两次发布" —— 通用能力沉淀进统一代码库，然后通过 Aruba 与 Mist 各自的 UI 暴露出去，同时产品逐步收敛。

对企业 Wi-Fi 工程师而言，这是 Wi-Fi 6 后时代规模最大的 WLAN 管理整合事件。Aruba Central 与 Mist 此前分别是两阵营各自的 AI 驱动 WLAN 管理领头羊，现在都被 HPE 收入囊中。CEO Antonio Neri 的表述 —— 即 Wi-Fi 7 部署将成为统一平台所管理的第一代网络 —— 把这次整合锚定在已经正在进行的 Wi-Fi 7 部署浪潮上（见 2026-05-01_wifi7-deployment-milestone-2026.md）。

竞争格局也更清晰：根据 IDC 的市场领导者认定，HPE Aruba 与思科已成为企业 WLAN 的两强格局；思科以 G300 AI 网络芯片、AgenticOps 管理套件以及预计 2026 下半年交付的液冷 Nexus 8000/9000 交换机回应。

技术要点

  • 两平台整合： Aruba Central + Juniper Mist 合并为统一代码库
  • 策略： "一次构建、两次发布" —— 共享后端、双 UI 并行，逐步收敛
  • 时间线： 共享能力 2026 Q1 陆续发布
  • 锚点是 Wi-Fi 7： Wi-Fi 7 部署将成为统一平台所管理的第一代网络
  • 竞争格局： HPE Aruba vs Cisco；思科以 G300 芯片 + AgenticOps + 2026 下半年液冷 Nexus 交换机回应
  • 市场定位（IDC）： HPE Aruba 与思科是仅有的两家企业 WLAN 市场领导者

意义与新意

  • 本十年最大规模的企业 WLAN 整合。 当每一代代际中的领头厂商都被同一家厂商收购，企业 WLAN 管理面的多样性叙事就被削去一层。值得跟踪：与非 HPE 设备的互操作性如何处理。
  • AI 原生管理已不可选。 HPE 与思科的回应都把智能体 AI 放在管理面 —— 隐性抬高了企业 WLAN 销售的底线。
  • 客户侧决策压力。 当前同时运行 Aruba/Mist 混合舰队的企业现在有了明确的路线图（以及厂商倾向）去做整合。2026 年的采购决策将以此次收敛为前提考虑。
entries.search_blob: hpe merges aruba central and juniper mist platforms — unified ai-native enterprise wlan brain (q1 2026) hpe 整合 aruba central 与 juniper mist 平台 —— 统一 ai 原生的企业 wlan 大脑（2026 第一季度） 802.11be agentic-ai products mac-layer following hpe's acquisition of juniper networks (closed late 2025), hpe discover unveiled the integration plan for the two enterprise wlan management platforms: **aruba central** and **juniper mist**. the two platforms are being merged into a single "ai-native network brain" with shared capabilities rolling out throughout q1 2026. the strategy is described internally as **"build once, deploy twice"** — common functionality is built into a unified codebase, then surfaced through both aruba and mist uis while the products converge. 继 hpe 在 2025 年底完成对 juniper networks 的收购后，hpe discover 大会披露了两大企业 wlan 管理平台 **aruba central** 与 **juniper mist** 的整合计划：两个平台将合并为一个"ai 原生的网络大脑"，共享能力将在 2026 第一季度陆续上线。hpe 内部将该策略称为**"一次构建、两次发布"** —— 通用能力沉淀进统一代码库，然后通过 aruba 与 mist 各自的 ui 暴露出去，同时产品逐步收敛。 industry-news wifi

entries.title_en: NearLink SLE elevated to Chinese national standard: GB/T 46803.1/.2-2025 (polar-code low-power short-range PHY + data-link layer)
entries.title_zh: 星闪 SLE 升级为国家标准：GB/T 46803.1/.2-2025（基于极化码的低功耗无线通信网络 物理层 + 数据链路层）
entries.summary_short_en: On 2 December 2025 China's State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) released two recommended national standards that codify the NearLink (星闪 / SparkLink) low-energy mode — SLE — into the GB/T system: **GB/T 46803.1-2025 "Information technology — Low-power wireless communication network based on polar codes — Part 1: Physical layer"** and **GB/T 46803.2-2025 — Part 2: Data link layer**. Both are recommended (GB/T) national standards with an implementation date of 1 July 2026. Notably, the standard titles describe the technology generically as a "low-power wireless communication network based on polar codes" rather than naming the brand — the conventional framing for a Chinese national standard — but these are the national-standard realisation of NearLink's SLE access stack.
entries.summary_short_zh: 2025 年 12 月 2 日，国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）发布两项推荐性国家标准，将星闪（NearLink / SparkLink）的低功耗模式 SLE 纳入 GB/T 体系：**GB/T 46803.1-2025《信息技术 基于极化码的低功耗无线通信网络 第1部分：物理层》** 与 **GB/T 46803.2-2025 第2部分：数据链路层**。两者均为推荐性（GB/T）国家标准，实施日期为 2026 年 7 月 1 日。值得注意的是，标准名称以"基于极化码的低功耗无线通信网络"这一通用表述命名，而非直接使用品牌名——这是中国国家标准的惯常做法——但其实质即星闪 SLE 接入协议栈的国标化落地。
entries.body_html_en:
Summary

On 2 December 2025 China's State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) released two recommended national standards that codify the NearLink (星闪 / SparkLink) low-energy mode — SLE — into the GB/T system: GB/T 46803.1-2025 "Information technology — Low-power wireless communication network based on polar codes — Part 1: Physical layer" and GB/T 46803.2-2025 — Part 2: Data link layer. Both are recommended (GB/T) national standards with an implementation date of 1 July 2026. Notably, the standard titles describe the technology generically as a "low-power wireless communication network based on polar codes" rather than naming the brand — the conventional framing for a Chinese national standard — but these are the national-standard realisation of NearLink's SLE access stack.

The two parts split the SLE radio stack along the usual layered boundary: Part 1 fixes the physical layer (modulation/coding built on polar codes, the channel structure, and the low-power PHY procedures that let SLE reach Bluetooth-class power while keeping NearLink's latency/reliability targets), and Part 2 fixes the data link layer (framing, channel access, and link control above the PHY). This is the SLE counterpart to the high-throughput SLB mode; SLE targets IoT sensors, wearables and other low-power endpoints, whereas SLB targets high-bandwidth automotive/projection use cases.

The national-standard step builds directly on the alliance-level NearLink 2.0 specification published by the International NearLink Alliance in March 2025 (which added audio transport and integrated sensing-and-communication to the end-to-end protocol system). Moving from an alliance specification to a SAMR GB/T standard is the institutional milestone: it gives the SLE PHY and data-link layer a citable national reference for procurement, certification and cross-vendor interoperability, which is what large-scale industrial and government adoption in China typically waits for.

Key technical points

  • Two recommended national standards, released 2025-12-02, in force 2026-07-01:
  • GB/T 46803.1-2025 — 信息技术 基于极化码的低功耗无线通信网络 第1部分：物理层 (PHY: polar-code-based modulation/coding, channel structure, low-power procedures).
  • GB/T 46803.2-2025 — 第2部分：数据链路层 (data link layer: framing, channel access, link control).
  • These standardise the SLE (SparkLink Low Energy) side of NearLink — the Bluetooth-class-power, IoT/wearable mode — as opposed to the high-throughput SLB mode.
  • Built on the alliance-level NearLink 2.0 spec (March 2025); this is the GB/T national-standard realisation, not a new technical version.
  • GB/T = recommended (not mandatory) national standard; significance is institutional — a citable national reference for procurement/certification/interoperability.

Why it matters / what's new

The KB has tracked NearLink mainly through alliance specs (NearLink 1.0/2.0), chip-shipment milestones, and consumer-product adoption (Huawei phones, the Enjoy 90, peripherals). This is the first entry on a GB/T national standard for NearLink, and it pins down a fact the prior coverage left implicit: the SLE radio is specified as a polar-code-based low-power PHY + data-link layer, now with a SAMR document number and a 2026-07-01 in-force date. It is the standards-track anchor for the SLE side of the ecosystem and the institutional precondition that typically precedes broad Chinese industrial/government deployment — worth watching for the parallel SLB national-standard parts and any conformance/certification scheme that references these GB/T numbers.
entries.body_html_zh:
摘要

2025 年 12 月 2 日，国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）发布两项推荐性国家标准，将星闪（NearLink / SparkLink）的低功耗模式 SLE 纳入 GB/T 体系：GB/T 46803.1-2025《信息技术 基于极化码的低功耗无线通信网络 第1部分：物理层》 与 GB/T 46803.2-2025 第2部分：数据链路层。两者均为推荐性（GB/T）国家标准，实施日期为 2026 年 7 月 1 日。值得注意的是，标准名称以"基于极化码的低功耗无线通信网络"这一通用表述命名，而非直接使用品牌名——这是中国国家标准的惯常做法——但其实质即星闪 SLE 接入协议栈的国标化落地。

两部分按经典分层边界拆分 SLE 无线协议栈：第 1 部分规定物理层（基于极化码的调制/编码、信道结构，以及让 SLE 在保持星闪时延/可靠性目标的同时达到蓝牙级功耗的低功耗 PHY 流程）；第 2 部分规定数据链路层（帧结构、信道接入与链路控制）。这是与高吞吐 SLB 模式相对应的 SLE 一侧：SLE 面向 IoT 传感器、可穿戴等低功耗终端，而 SLB 面向高带宽的车载/投屏等场景。

国标化这一步直接建立在国际星闪联盟 2025 年 3 月发布的星闪 2.0 标准之上（该版本为端到端协议体系新增了音频传输与通感一体等核心规范）。从联盟标准上升为 SAMR 的 GB/T 国家标准是制度层面的里程碑：它为 SLE 物理层与数据链路层提供了可被采购、认证与跨厂商互操作引用的国家级依据——这通常正是中国大规模工业与政府采用所等待的前提。

技术要点

  • 两项推荐性国家标准，2025-12-02 发布，2026-07-01 实施：
  • GB/T 46803.1-2025——《信息技术 基于极化码的低功耗无线通信网络 第1部分：物理层》（PHY：基于极化码的调制/编码、信道结构、低功耗流程）。
  • GB/T 46803.2-2025——第2部分：数据链路层（帧结构、信道接入、链路控制）。
  • 标准化的是星闪的 SLE（SparkLink Low Energy）一侧——蓝牙级功耗的 IoT/可穿戴模式，区别于高吞吐的 SLB 模式。
  • 建立在联盟级星闪 2.0 标准（2025 年 3 月）之上；这是 GB/T 国标化落地，而非新的技术版本。
  • GB/T 为推荐性（非强制）国家标准；其意义在制度层面——为采购/认证/互操作提供可引用的国家级依据。

意义与新意

KB 此前主要通过联盟标准（星闪 1.0/2.0）、芯片出货里程碑与消费产品采用（华为手机、Enjoy 90、外设）来跟踪星闪。本条目是首个关于星闪 GB/T 国家标准 的条目，并明确了此前报道隐含的事实：SLE 无线被规定为基于极化码的低功耗物理层 + 数据链路层，如今有了 SAMR 文件编号与 2026-07-01 的实施日期。它是生态中 SLE 一侧的标准锚点，也是中国大规模工业/政府部署通常的制度前提——后续值得关注与之对应的 SLB 国标分册，以及引用这些 GB/T 编号的一致性/认证方案。
